name: refresh_meminit
short_description: Update and initialize the BRAM initialization strings with contents of elf files.
full_help:
refresh_meminit

Description: 
Update and initialize the BRAM initialization strings with contents of elf files.

Syntax: 
refresh_meminit  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
FileIO, Project, Memory Initialization

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
